text:
Created attachment 177456
Update to 1.7g

- Update to 1.7g
- Resurrect test syntax
- Include Atari MadMac syntax (6502, 68k, Jaguar)
- Include support for TR3200 (virtual CPU from 0x10c)
- Mark port as NO_ARCH

portlint:
  WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
  
testport:
